Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert P. Gates, Esq., of Erskine & Tulley, Tel. 415.392.5431 x2051, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GIA NGUYEN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
